name: New Murchison Gold Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 40% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.0460, stop A$0.0347, target A$0.0510 (0.44:1) — then trail it.
